site.title: Vaega o Galuega Faavaomalo mo le Maua o Faamatalaga
site.tagline: Mai le manaʻomia o le faigofie ona maua i faletupe a le malo
nav.label: Uluaʻi
skip.toContent: Faʻafeiloaʻi i mea o loʻo i totonu
meta.home.description: Ua liliu e le IATF manaʻoga moni mo le faigofie ona maua o faamatalaga i nofoaga e teu ai faamatalaga mo le lautele.
meta.projects.description: Suʻesuʻe poloketi a le lautele na lolomiina e ala i le IATF.
meta.propose.description: Talosagaina se poloketi avanoa mai le IATF e ala i le upega tafaʻilagi, imeli, poʻo le Discord.
meta.governance.description: Faitau i le auala e talia ai e le IATF galuega faatino, pulea ai faletusi, ma faasaoina ai galuega mo tagata lautele.
meta.join.description: Auala e auai ai i le IATF: saofaga code, faaliliu, tofotofoina, po o le tausia o se galuega faatino.
meta.accessibility.description: Faʻafefea e le IATF ona faʻamoemoe e faʻaavanoa lenei 'upega tafaʻilagi ma faʻafefea ona lipotia se faʻalavelave faʻaletonu.
meta.transparency.description: Faʻamaumauga lautele a le IATF: o faʻaiuga, poloketi, ma faʻafouga o loʻo matala i taimi uma.
registry.empty.title: E leai ni galuega faatino na lomia i le taimi nei
registry.empty.body: O loo sauniunia e le IATF lana uluaʻi poloketi mo tagata lautele.
proposal.form.title: Auina atu se talosaga
proposal.form.body: Faatumu le pepa o loo i lalo e auina atu ai se talosaga i le IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: E manaʻomia le JavaScript e faʻaaoga ai lenei 'upega tafaʻilagi. Afai e le maua, faʻaoga le imeli poʻo le Discord nai lo.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: O lenei pepa o le a tatala ai lau imeli client nai lo lena.
proposal.form.ready: O le taimi lava e te auina atu ai le talosaga, o le a faia ai e le IATF se faamaumauga o le talosaga.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Faʻamolemole faʻamaeʻa le spam puipuiga siaki ae leʻi lafoina.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Ua le toe aoga le puipuiga mai le spam. Fa'amolemole toe fa'amae'a le siaki a'o le'i lafoina atu.
proposal.form.turnstileError: E le'i mafai ona fa'amaonia le puipuiga mai le spam i le taimi nei. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Ua uma le taimi o le puipuiga mai le spam. Faamolemole toe taumafai e siaki.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Faamolemole faatumu fanua e manaʻomia a o leʻi lafoina atu.
proposal.form.success: Faafetai. Ua maua lau talosaga ma ua teuina mo le toe iloiloina.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Afai e toe faafesootaʻi le IATF e faatatau i lenei talosaga, ia aofia ai le faasinomaga o loo i lalo.
proposal.form.successLinkLabel: Tatalaina o faamaumauga o le taumafaina
proposal.form.successSummaryTitle: O le a le mea na auina atu
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Sa i ai se mea na sese ao auina atu le talosaga. Faamolemole toe taumafai. Afai e faaauau pea le faafitauli, faaaoga imeli nai lo.
project.detail.eyebrow: Ulufale i le poloketi a le lautele
project.detail.problemTitle: O le ā le faafitauli ua foʻia e lenei galuega
project.detail.whyTitle: Le pogai o le iai o lenei poloketi
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Faamatalaga i le gagana Peretania, e mafai ona faaopoopo faaliliuga i se taimi mulimuli ane
footer.label: Faʻamatalaga i lalo o le upega tafaʻilagi
footer.howToContribute: Auala e faia ai se sao
footer.blurb: E tatau ona faigofie ona amata, faigofie ona lomia, ma faigofie foʻi ona tatala pea galuega e faatatau i le faigofie ona maua o faamatalaga.
footer.source: Faasino i tulaga faatonuina o le faigofie ona maua: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Faʻataʻitaʻiga faʻamaonia e tagata e faʻaaogaina tekinolosi fesoasoani.
contact.label: Faʻafesoʻotaʻi
translation.label: Tulaga o le faaliliuga
translation.source: O le gagana Peretania o le gagana autū o lenei itulau.
translation.humanReviewed: Ua toe iloiloina lenei faaliliuga e se failauga lelei.
translation.machineAssisted: O lenei faaliliuga ua fesoasoani masini ma e le i toe iloiloina atoatoa e se failauga fluent. e talia fautuaga e ala i GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Na toe iloiloina lenei faaliliuga a o leʻi toe faafouina le gagana Peretania, ma atonu e manaʻomia ona toe teuteuina.
translation.report: Lipoti se faafitauli i le faaliliuga: {{contact.i18nEmail}}O le ā le mea ua tupu?
